name: bino-reporting
description: Author, build, debug, and preview bino-cli PDF reports. Skills cover manifest authoring, data exploration via bino lsp-helper, error diagnosis, and the build/preview/serve lifecycle. Includes /bino-init, /bino-lint, /bino-build, /bino-preview, /bino-graph slash commands and bino-report-architect / bino-data-analyst subagents.
